scenario: doc-audit v0.3.5 class-routed panel with B12/B13/B14b/B16
architecture: 1 architect + 44 lens dispatches (22 haiku TRIVIAL + 22 sonnet REVIEWER) + 1 synthesizer
cache_modeling: first dispatch pays full corpus; 43 subsequent at 0.3× cache_read rate
methodology: size-based estimate with B13 cache modeled at Anthropic published rate
quality_notes: Sampled docs show dense command examples, cross-links, and schema/prose claims, so splitting keyword/link extraction from reasoning keeps cheap lenses deterministic while reserving Sonnet for judgment. This is higher-quality than a v0.2 generic panel because separate REVIEWER Lens C dedicates full Sonnet reasoning to drift detection, while Lens D independently drafts edit diffs instead of doing three lenses inline in one prose pass.
